data.content: Implementation review rejected: the key-based remount fix (worktree-foolery-62fa-reset-fix branch, commit 2ffbad1a) has not been merged to main. On main, the Set state Select (filter-bar.tsx:170-183) does not remount after applying a value, so selecting the same terminal state twice consecutively fails silently. The fix branch has the correct implementation (useState + key prop + setBulkStateSelectKey increment) and updated tests. Action needed: merge worktree-foolery-62fa-reset-fix into main and verify quality gates pass.
